summary: Tested Bank Assignment feature for User Management. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - User Management shows Assigned Banks column with pill badges, Edit dialog has bank checkbox list. Agent with assigned_banks (SBI, HDFC Bank) only sees 2 loans from those banks. Admin sees all 7 loans including ICICI. Analytics/overview respects bank filtering.

ui_bugs.issue: Bank checkboxes show unchecked even when user has banks assigned. This is due to case mismatch - stored values are 'SBI', 'HDFC Bank' but master bank names are 'SBI BANK', 'HDFC BANK'. The pills below show correctly but checkboxes don't reflect current state.

passed_tests: GET /api/users - Returns users with assigned_banks field
Agent user has SBI and HDFC Bank assigned
Agent with assigned_banks only sees loans from those banks
Agent does NOT see ICICI loans (correctly filtered)
Admin sees ALL loans (7 total) including ICICI
GET /api/analytics/overview - Agent overview filtered by bank
POST /api/auth/register - Create user with assigned_banks works
Clearing assigned_banks (empty array) lets agent see all own loans
GET /api/master/banks - Returns list of banks for dropdown
UI: User Management table shows 'Assigned Banks' column
UI: Agent row shows SBI and HDFC Bank as pill badges
UI: Edit dialog shows Assigned Banks checkbox list
UI: Agent MIS page shows only 2 loans (SBI Client, HDFC Client)
UI: Agent dashboard Bank-wise Analysis shows only HDFC Bank and SBI
UI: Admin MIS page shows all 7 loans including ICICI
action_items: MINOR: Fix checkbox state in Edit User dialog - checkboxes should be checked when bank name matches (case-insensitive comparison needed)
critical_code_review_comments: Bank name matching in UserManagement.jsx uses exact string match. Consider case-insensitive comparison for assigned_banks vs masterBanks names.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work, minor checkbox display issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Assignment feature fully tested. Agent (agent@mhpfintech.com) has assigned_banks: ['SBI', 'HDFC Bank']. Agent sees 2 loans, Admin sees 7 loans. Minor UI issue: checkboxes in Edit dialog don't show checked state due to case mismatch between stored values and master bank names. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_bank_assignment.py covers all scenarios.
